inputs.label: Power (W)
inputs.businessContext: The power in watts to be converted to various horsepower units.

businessContext_i18n.en: The power in watts to be converted to various horsepower units.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Watts cinsinden güç, çeşitli beygir gücü birimlerine dönüştürülecek.

inputs.label: Mechanical HP Factor (W/HP)
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor for mechanical/imperial horsepower (1 HP = 745.6998715822702 W).

businessContext_i18n.en: Conversion factor for mechanical/imperial horsepower (1 HP = 745.6998715822702 W).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mekanik/emperyal beygir gücü için dönüşüm faktörü (1 HP = 745,6998715822702 W).

inputs.label: Metric HP Factor (W/HP)

businessContext_i18n.tr: Metrik beygir gücü için dönüşüm faktörü (1 HP = 735,49875 W).

inputs.label: Electrical HP Factor (W/HP)
inputs.businessContext: Conversion factor for electrical horsepower (1 HP = 746 W).

inputs.label: Boiler HP Factor (W/HP)
